meta.question: Which of the organization's models are about restaurant or food order processes? (Organization ID: 985f88f59e8b4962a0a2c2fec001b6d1)
meta.finalAnswer: The model "7) Choreographie und Konversation" (ID: sid_640bbb71_018f_49b9_b1bf_87ab98bd4f71) belonging to the organization is related to a restaurant or food order process. This is evidenced by tasks within the model such as "Bringt Bestellung zum Tisch" (brings order to the table), "Holt Bestellung ab" (picks up order), "bearbeitet Bestellung" (processes order), and "übergibt Bestellung" (hands over order).
